review_summary: Mostly thoughtful but flagged a race condition between the merchant-create event and the first fraud-rule evaluation. Walked Mei through the event-ordering invariant we rely on and pointed at the regression test in `tests/integration/onboarding_test.py`. Reviewed in 4 rounds before approving.
exemplar_comment: the issue here is that the merchant-create event is fire-and-forget but the fraud-rule evaluator assumes the merchant row exists. happy path works because the db write is fast, but under load you'll see ~0.3% of the first transactions skip rule eval entirely. easiest fix is to gate eval on a successful merchant-create ack, not just the event emit.

review_summary: Good first significant PR from David. Approved with two minor suggestions on error-handling. Spent ~30 min in a follow-up call walking through how the rules-engine fits into the broader fraud platform — David is newer and I wanted to make sure he had the mental model, not just the code change.
exemplar_comment: this is solid. one small thing: when a rule evaluator throws, we currently swallow it and default to 'allow' — that's almost never what we want for a fraud system. consider a circuit-breaker per-rule that escalates to manual-review after N consecutive failures. doesn't have to be in this PR but worth a follow-up ticket.

pr_title: Migrate API gateway to OpenTelemetry tracing
review_summary: Cross-team review. Sahib's PR added OTel tracing to the shared API gateway. Reviewed for impact on the fraud-scoring path latency budget (we have a strict <50ms p99 add). Confirmed no regression after looking at the trace export sampling config.

Tisha was on rotation from Growth Platform helping us land a schema split. Pushed back on the migration strategy — the original plan would have held a long lock on `transactions`. Suggested an online migration via `pg_repack` instead. Tisha hadn't done a migration of this size before; we paired on it for ~1.5 hrs to land a safer version.
exemplar_comment: the lock-time estimate here assumes a quiet window, but we don't have one — fraud-scoring is hot 24/7. let's do this online. happy to pair on the pg_repack setup if you haven't used it before.
